name: Veolia Water Technologies Asia Pacific
description: The company, a leading specialist in water treatment and a subsidiary of the Veolia group, designs and delivers wastewater treatment plants and equipment for both industrial and municipal customers. Their standardized technologies and local services ensure they can effectively meet diverse wastewater treatment needs.

name: Waste Water Solutions
description: Waste Water Solutions is a full-service contractor specializing in commercial wastewater treatment and disposal. They offer a wide range of tailored services, including the construction, operation, and maintenance of wastewater treatment facilities.

name: Product Solutions
description: Chem-Aqua specializes in providing custom-designed water treatment programs, which can be essential for effective wastewater treatment. Their Total System Approach and state-of-the-art products help protect critical systems and lower operational costs, emphasizing the importance of comprehensive water treatment solutions.

name: Eflo International Ltd
description: EFLO International Ltd specializes in wastewater treatment, offering a variety of innovative processes and systems designed for sewage and industrial applications. Their portfolio includes advanced technologies such as the Eflo Constant Transfer Extended Aeration and EfloSBR Filandraw Sequential Batch Reactor plants, as well as sludge dewatering solutions.

name: WTE Infra Projects Pvt. Ltd.
description: WTE Infra is a prominent manufacturer of water and wastewater treatment plants, offering advanced engineering solutions that enhance the understanding and process of water treatment. With over 5,100 projects delivered globally, the company specializes in creating and installing top-notch engineered products for various industries.

name: Waterland Su Arıtma ve Çevre Teknolojileri
description: WATERLAND specializes in wastewater treatment solutions, offering a variety of technologies such as Membrane Bio-Reactor (MBR) and processes like acidification and flocculation. Their expertise ensures effective treatment and reclamation of water in both industrial and municipal settings.

name: WESTECH
description: WesTech Engineering, LLC is dedicated to addressing the global need for clean water through advanced wastewater treatment solutions. With nearly 50 years of experience, they provide expertly designed systems that meet municipal and industrial water-quality requirements, ensuring effective and sustainable water resource recovery.

name: Corodex Industries
description: Corodex, in collaboration with EFLO International Ltd, offers a range of turnkey and package systems specifically for wastewater treatment. With over 40 years of experience, EFLO is recognized as a leading manufacturer of sewage treatment plants, providing extensive customization options for various applications.

name: MWH Treatment
description: MWH Treatment is a leading solution provider in the water sector, offering a comprehensive range of services for wastewater treatment. With a focus on sustainable solutions and a strong workforce, the company is well-equipped to deliver innovative and effective wastewater management strategies.

name: Purewater Technology LLC
description: Pure Water Technology LLC specializes in high-quality and cost-effective wastewater treatment solutions, making it a key player in the field. With qualifications from major authorities like the Abu Dhabi Water & Electricity Authority and the Abu Dhabi Sewerage Services Company, they are well-equipped to handle various wastewater treatment projects.
